body:
This PR updates the ClimaCoreTempestRemap compat entries:
 - Includes NCDatasets v0.12
 - Removes the patch version for ClimaCore

This should close #1032.
title: Update ClimaCoreTempestRemap compat entries

body:
This PR aims to add two mountain test cases to the main branch.

1. Agnesi Mountain (nonhydrostatic + total energy)
2. Schar Mountain (nonhydrostatic + total energy)

This allows other users to access generic box mountain test cases for experimentation with new formulations of the equations.
